arts.ttl: Champions League live updates: Dortmund-Barcelona, Villa-PSG

arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers locked in Matheus Cunha on a long-term deal during the winter transfer window, fending off interest from several clubs at the time. But that hasn’t put a stop to the rumors about his future. Cunha has emerged as a key figure for Wolves, shining in multiple attacking roles and consistently making an impact. arts.ttl: Who will Aston Villa play in the Champions League semi-finals if they spark up PSG comeback?
arts.sum: Aston Villa are aiming to make history when they lock horns with Paris Saint-Germain in the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final showdown tonight (8pm). Who will Aston Villa play in the Champions League semi-finals if they spark up PSG comeback?

arts.ttl: Bournemouth, Nottingham Forest Push Hard for £35M-Rated Chelsea Loanee Wanted by PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been leaning more on Ligue 1 talent to build a younger, more dynamic squad in recent windows. The arrivals of Bradley Barcola and Desire Doue from domestic rivals are clear examples of that shift. arts.ttl: Morgan Rogers: Man Utd face MAJOR competition for Aston Villa superstar
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly set to face significant competition for Aston Villa star Morgan Rogers during the upcoming summer transfer window. The 22-year-old has attracted a number of suitors following an immense campaign under Unai Emery and Man Utd have emerged as strong contenders to acquire his signature this summer amid their pursuit of several new attacking players.
